content_body: Our ten year old son is being admitted to Egleston for a bone marrow transplant to hopefully cure his rare form of Leukemia. My husband and I wanted to take a short trip with him and our eight year old daughter before we are all separated for over 100 days. God directed us to your home. Between pool matches, playing charades, enjoying the hot tub, fishing on the river, and building a fort in the woods we had the best time ever! He has asked that we return when he gets better in the fall. Through the power of the great physicians, I know we will.
title: Memories Made in the North Georgia Mountains of Blue Ridge, GA
